goal: Generate a premium search page hero image — a clean compact SUV ready for pickup at a hotel parking area in Orlando, no people, right-frame placement, left side open for headline overlay.

creative_direction.core_idea: El vehículo perfecto esperándote — limpio, listo, posicionado en área hotel Orlando
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Esta imagen ancla la página search con confianza: vehículo real en contexto real de Orlando

composition.layout: vehicle in right two-thirds, left third open for headline overlay

camera.angle: low 3/4 front angle, slightly below eye level

overlay_compatibility.left_third: open Florida blue sky or soft architectural shadow — clean for dark headline text

subject.description: Compact SUV: Nissan Rogue, Toyota RAV4, or Honda CR-V style — neutral color (silver, white, or charcoal), spotless, hotel pickup ready
subject.placement: right two-thirds of frame, 3/4 front angle

scene.location: Hotel or resort parking area, Lake Buena Vista or International Drive, Orlando, Florida
scene.time_of_day: Florida midday sun — bright, clean highlights on vehicle paint
environment: Florida blue sky with soft clouds
clean hotel architecture softly visible in background
scene.background_view: Resort hotel entrance or parking area — Lake Buena Vista or I-Drive zone
critical_scene_rules: No rental company logos or dealership decals on vehicle

lighting.effects: clean highlights on vehicle body, clear paint reflections, sharp shadows

accent: warm golden highlights on vehicle body
rules: Sky must feel specifically Floridian — vivid blue

master_prompt: Create a premium editorial search page hero image for a car rental marketplace. Show a clean compact SUV — Nissan Rogue, Toyota RAV4, or Honda CR-V style — in silver or white, spotless and ready for guest pickup, parked at a hotel or resort parking area in Orlando, Florida, specifically Lake Buena Vista or International Drive zone. Position the vehicle in the right two-thirds of the 16:9 frame at a low 3/4 front angle, leaving the left third visually open with Florida blue sky or soft architectural shadow for white headline text overlay. Background shows Florida blue sky with soft clouds, palm trees or tropical vegetation, and soft resort hotel architecture. Use bright Florida midday natural sunlight with clean highlights on the vehicle body and clear paint reflections. The vehicle must look spotless and professionally maintained — no rental logos, no dealership decals, no convertibles. The image should feel like a reliable, trustworthy car rental operation at a premium Orlando resort. Avoid text, watermarks, people, rental company logos, convertibles, dirty vehicles, overcast sky, cold tones, beach context, and generic stock photo energy.
